title: polypodium fragile
intro: Polypodium fragile, also known as fragile polypody, is a type of fern native to Asia and is scientifically classified as a species of the Polypodium genus. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Polypodium fragile include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as being used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various ailments, including respiratory issues and fever.
